_comment: Achievement definitions. id must match Achievements.gd hooks. Fields: title_zh/en, desc_zh/en, icon.

achievements.desc_zh: 离开熟悉，向着远处的光起步。
achievements.desc_en: Leave the familiar and step toward the distant light.

achievements.desc_zh: 背着重担，走出将倾之城的城门。
achievements.desc_en: Pass the gate of the doomed city, burden and all.

achievements.desc_zh: 叩门蒙接纳，踏上真正的窄路。
achievements.desc_en: Knock, be received, and enter the narrow way.

achievements.desc_zh: 在十字架前，重担从背上滚落。
achievements.desc_en: At the Cross the weight rolls from your back.

achievements.desc_zh: 在讲解者之家看懂每一间房的教训。
achievements.desc_en: Weigh every room in the House of the Interpreter.

achievements.desc_zh: 不走旁路捷径，走窄而陡的正路。
achievements.desc_en: Take the steep true path, not the easy bypath.

achievements.desc_zh: 领受神所赐的全副军装（弗六）。
achievements.desc_en: Receive the whole armour of God (Eph. 6).

achievements.desc_zh: 以信德的盾与圣灵的剑击退控告者。
achievements.desc_en: Beat back the accuser with the shield of faith.

achievements.desc_zh: 在黑暗中不偏左右，持守真道前行。
achievements.desc_en: Keep the path through the Valley of the Shadow.

achievements.desc_zh: 在虚华市不买世界的虚荣，只买真理。
achievements.desc_en: Buy the truth and none of Vanity Fair's glitter.

achievements.desc_zh: 想起怀中的应许之钥，胜过绝望巨人。
achievements.desc_en: Remember the Key of Promise; escape Giant Despair.

achievements.desc_zh: 在可喜山受牧人指引，远远看见圣城。
achievements.desc_en: From the Delectable Mountains, glimpse the City.

achievements.desc_zh: 凭信渡过没有桥的死河，盼望扶持你。
achievements.desc_en: Cross the bridgeless River of Death by faith.

achievements.desc_zh: 众门为你敞开，领受生命的冠冕。
achievements.desc_en: The gates open; receive the crown of life.

achievements.desc_zh: 在跌倒处诚实认罪，被恩典重新扶起。
achievements.desc_en: Confess honestly and be lifted by grace again.
Hide your first verse in the heart.
Hide five verses in the heart.
Hide ten verses in the heart.

achievements.desc_zh: 从初醒到蒙接纳，走完整段天路。
achievements.desc_en: From first waking to final welcome — the road complete.
